subject: Yes, there is a crisis

body:
Joe Biden, Democrats, and the liberal media continue to deny the fact that there is a crisis at our southern border. [](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=57aff562e681477fb7b9f97ed9d595a7&_e=pZd2ucIJqhN77iXLyRxB56vniwbxP-abcgKOu2Tbm6aQFYliP-fkKK4bRkatEAlT6XiEjbbnIo5lodrvt040q-WX9pFfgqievO7T6O9uC55TDYJuKlH_1SUpgN9rsKhd-AtkWuwBuYzAO0NvWdbYwtb9bFdJ2BgFSvIvnqwR4MBIEcnRnEjka64-SC-erbXPT1UX0WnSzD9MGL4dZKEd-ae7-QPJ6G-f1vKatyLunV7JX77WOW2HIAGQrJCdq0irQDpyo0eZ6xG9Rm2tZUnH72zwA27TwiMbf_R3XnJQ0lCWmqPqD8YMp7a0OMVYkYqzPOnsWpckuFCG6Qgr9giigw%3D%3D) Fellow American, Joe Biden, Democrats, and the liberal media continue to deny the fact that there is a crisis at our southern border.

**They are using taxpayer money to rent hotel rooms for illegal immigrants while thousands of our homeless vets and National Guard at the U.S. Capitol sleep on the ground!**

It’s clear that Joe Biden does not care about Americans. _**He is putting illegal aliens first!**_ [_**Put Americans First Again!**_](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=57aff562e681477fb7b9f97ed9d595a7&_e=pZd2ucIJqhN77iXLyRxB58CYkBJo14ApmijpeveH7JJGShGHFP8de8rx1ASO4LvE6oL_Ofkiv-KX5KqHmsCXB6UKJM9GhIs95GwoQM5dYZJOd1EhjkJ0ESqF6Jwlv0d4CchfHZ9NJV4iifYtqHs77HBlJmBcHhkM7lHK4SqmS_HYolK5hZmgHLrrwYM4Kzm83-QRdCaPsE7_Aq35q7m-Q9IJwPTXNyZHnxCxMl373lLPEt-SeDQK1LygzQhWGNbWth6NjgLyo1nOc9e8cp9aGZeI2mXK4uNSKtNI9bSBL86aLdKaIDpMvE2YGO4hdSaSk197iluAL2k31ycsuuFSOqQLV1wlAkkRuTycaAnAcb6le4FgKeUSz6-qz_lJjBjQLocZupp1YRU1zCO-e01Nkw%3D%3D) _Joe Biden is completely mismanaging the border._ **To break it down, here are Biden’s 5 mismanaging steps:**
* **Step 1:** [Rollback](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=57aff562e681477fb7b9f97ed9d595a7&_e=pZd2ucIJqhN77iXLyRxB51yLglGo8WLmO98O9YfCLabqdg4F8yxP6huEBXqbDS1Xw5Su35v0vL5rq6n8dGlrDKu-oUjzJHkTkXmQH2GnOs-PexJrRfhOncCycUu-Pc6mnKXPQMAShi_gmSQkMfO4SHPEptkeLLtUvVbH3J7GE729DZ-BA_MthsLBWd_kG3tQ-froe8MzuACxtdEoZshVKX7MEHpQxaqXJIL855fWv61OYuvafXTf0YkoB0zBCwOYZ9BeLl5P6S5q-44-9SD-Lq8UPqbhow7ITAenggwYu0sa7ZRu0POorkvFuxLcnzem2QPn2JV-XCMJsGhKiuUAiiIRZ3vGFHHyfd0ahq74WOpRPr9ds6Y_-ABOsYs4SYePlFrQlsvPDBbOIricU2lCPw%3D%3D) Trump’s border policies, like [stopping](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=57aff562e681477fb7b9f97ed9d595a7&_e=pZd2ucIJqhN77iXLyRxB5xtx6wXUHQZNM5u_-ZVguzHcPKCidgiPnXIJWYPgr9YGzfgCRB39fhZhyOfP0K1JWgH8brIgD-dfZJwkASzAq_7ZifpXTVAqO-H58GUKspLFqL7i7JNqQDX4lLVDYaPpThFzlU6De0PnEZsR-ejInVqv24BIUQ34i09i7URQfCXVi0IGu0H3ehI9C8KB6O1YkZz8Nojt_y1-Ws3Ml3OOAa4oOxBmdtnJ-F_1BF3U-ohf28GlrH6jlXo75sgP4k6s_rf3-yVYjdwoBCcnF73o9GVb05ZEYGzibVvCdlpanNj2sgPJMctJoGqy9ASLtqoU_xxZq9_3Yh_yMlLxKYftVdBe-8YSIIMHEK3BrQxL9e1TqUO2HOPkSG_qGJHlPhfggfQV-Zvw3iAvG-v5gQkui6hX2MxGGkq12ukHBo0rzMaLpOk6K76929maRZdlhYpPSYdYaMrguptNep0vgwgcCC-lMNkjZuVUo3vWwuk6b8JVSJgcfnAzmYuLErM7ySWh5HrNTlUVORTElKpvtk0-bG3uDjznWpBtsfcBETS3jygUzAagwGkkWyxZWWtbP0JU6nr2Y4AQBai69NSEUsJsQk6nKzSpt-iV7Tqf5CHhiVY4b9CMPYLaRkVaspfOsOC8LOPwkQk4vIMyuPvtIA3JlLf28fkOZ6w-NyWa8ooqc6ybMiIZqL0lJXZyXW5SvYW3MTZgO2rxJFCoAcJ69trrLwXl2vvrmbJidfGSXBQO-4QuyhAEsHDev3yC9UgFSdB43MXsH1ejZKMGSDCEl-8E37Tk9aVIZPRCSwbWadhROvthWg4l-YsfREEigEmLezYiGY_68730FeMGLC2kJOFPMX0%3D) the construction of the border wall that actually worked, thus creating a crisis.
* **Step 2:** Ignore border-state Democrats [warning](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=57aff562e681477fb7b9f97ed9d595a7&_e=pZd2ucIJqhN77iXLyRxB51yLglGo8WLmO98O9YfCLabqdg4F8yxP6huEBXqbDS1XAdyOwOfgvdIJvO6hZ7SZLBCvkHXTWl6xtX6K0n2J-cG0z3jfoFJw7X4552lr-CiIzWQGkco1-06iyI9FOtbwYQDCjt86vxQpB1NFxOunxaO_15tTV2JJH7ggU0PRNWBIqUM1aEhSgEuy5rMFL7YHvJktcLs0wzOM3SbJAKmZ1ierkuWgSybbJrAeCLM2J1q_2yP32hCH2-BfMN51wy9R6UWRQSvIWXEEGJiy7CXhnsBWxUeEXRefawZ8I5wiJ5lk-VjkILwGziNpf2c_o7UziXuuf8OxDq1TGjFfks8AwVSAQsuqK6TEEN7W-ZXPMvM-D_KB7qEaDLCuRYPECGAeLw%3D%3D) that Biden’s policies will create a crisis.
* **Step 3:** Once a crisis is [evident](http://links.msgop.co/u/click?_t=8490f3f542f84240a99e9ceb9c894519&_m=57aff562e681477fb7b9f97ed9d595a7&_e=pZd2ucIJqhN77iXLyRxB51yLglGo8WLmO98O9YfCLabqdg4F8yxP6huEBXqbDS1XDvc5J_1DyOMa5rHLoe20PS0ClKCiqHL5jLn8kXh3KWmJ88uh_WofTGT3XF66CZ4ZNvxCZferxj25fn3iqkMN6OBX6uR1ChJJ_HI9M36Zq5tJQLjQAGUbCLvWjHD0JdLo6R57qqxBEYxiCvKQeVclN66IRmJ_r-V2fU73Q5HTaDv1TzQxVdpQIpqTC2hfLSSPYsqSnHmPOjhzUlsPKOvsOQxNbW8IpY7e67MXUG70jX2N3DwFCUoXtlCHnkkmJQWX2eZlOSq_RMkev2TbbWgs09zH4FoS1i4z5wD_ZCUsO_rXU0mOtZ9CJLgS-TbJxdvsaQB_ETWrb0MK3loMxWYVPQ%3D%3D) for all to see, repeatedly deny the crisis exists.

NANCY PELOSI IS TRYING TO OVERTURN AN ELECTION IN IOWA!

Here are the facts about this election:

→ Republican Congresswoman Miller-Meeks defeated Democrat Rita
Hart by 6 votes!
→ The victory was officially certified by the Iowa Secretary of
State and a bipartisan state board in Iowa.
→ She was officially sworn into office and seated with the rest
of the Iowa delegation.

IF DEMOCRATS TRY TO CONTEST THIS ELECTION NOW AND OVERTURN IT,
THIS WOULD DISENFRANCHISE 400,000 IOWA VOTERS AND VIOLATE IOWA
STATE ELECTION LAW!

Not to mention this would further deteriorate Americans' faith in
our election process. What will stop Democrats from politicizing
every close election and overturning it in favor of their party's
candidate!

WE CAN'T LET THIS HAPPEN!

It's time for conservatives to Take A Stand & Win Back THE HOUSE,

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Melt Senate phones TODAY! Stop the Corrupt Politicians Act
body:
| |
---
[Call both of your Senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgzLTJiOGM2MmZkY2Q1MjRlOWU5MGI4YjRkMDcwYWRhZjI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM1NDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIw&K=tdMzn_qFVOo_8iKhW-0XfQ), whether Republican or Democrat, and convey the following messages during the phone call:

_**Tell them to vote no on S. 1, or as we call it, the Corrupt Politicians Act.**_

The House has already passed their version of this bill, and the Senate is set to hold the hearing on their version TODAY.

So, we need LOTS of calls into the Senate today.

**[Tell your Senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgzLTJiOGM2MmZkY2Q1MjRlOWU5MGI4YjRkMDcwYWRhZjI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDM1NDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIw&K=utRTVCDx2QGIRhqxiOc20w): it should be easy to vote, but hard to cheat.**

The Corrupt Politicians Act (S. 1) will make it hard to stop the cheating because it forbids voter ID, forces automatic voter registration, uses taxpayer money to fund campaigns, and will rig elections for incumbents.

Here is a script you can use:
Hi, my name is _[Your Name]_ , and I live in _[City, State]_. I am a constituent, and am calling today to urge my Senator to vote NO on S. 1.

The bottom line is that when it comes to American elections, it should be easy to vote, but hard to cheat. S. 1 makes it easier to cheat because it **removes** safeguards like forbidding voter ID, and it forces states to **add** policies that make cheating easier – such as automatic voter registration.

My Senator must vote no on S. 1. Thank you.
Please call your Senators TODAY! And then, pass this email and call to action on to others!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMDgzLTJiOGM2MmZkY2Q1MjRlOWU5MGI4YjRkMDcwYWRhZjI0%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9taWQ9NDM1NDMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=pxCrJ0BmORo0pHvCiBwoXA)
|
---

body:
Friend,

I am so excited to share our official campaign video with you.

[Check out our ](https://act.myngp.com/el/IOjjS0FeAbWz1FBTj7u3lrN3i08XaWEHT9GxFy9Tn5Q=/rYd6GIXbkLOoWGf2bRAmQHC1GjTrZVE2ZX797roQa8E=)[exciting launch video right here!](https://act.myngp.com/el/IOjjS0FeAbWz1FBTj7u3lrN3i08XaWEHT9GxFy9Tn5Q=/rYd6GIXbkLOoWGf2bRAmQHC1GjTrZVE2ZX797roQa8E=)

I don't come from wealth, I come from hard work.

[Donate now and be a part of our moral movement for a North Carolina that works for everyone.](https://act.myngp.com/el/IOjjS0FeAbWz1FBTj7u3lrN3i08XaWEHT9GxFy9Tn5Q=/rYd6GIXbkLOoWGf2bRAmQHC1GjTrZVE2ZX797roQa8E=)

Thank you for joining me in this fight.

One of us for all of us,
Erica

name: Bob Fertik - Democrats.com
subject: Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100165471.545693.14&gen=1).
| [](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165471.545693.14&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18234)
---
| **BECOME A GRASSROOTS CO-SIGNER OF ELIZABETH WARREN 'S, PRAMILA JAYAPAL'S AND BRENDAN BOYLE'S NEW WEALTH TAX**
This pandemic has shone a spotlight on increasing levels of income and wealth inequality. Over the last twelve months, as tens of millions of people have lost their jobs, and as 25 million people have contracted COVID-19, with more than 500,000 people dying from the virus, America's billionaires have never had it so good. [According to research from Americans for Tax Fairness](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165471.545693.14&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18235), America's 660 billionaires have seen a 44% increase in their wealth since last March?totaling $1.3 trillion. Now, Senator Elizabeth Warren and Representatives Pramila Jayapal and Brendan Boyle have introduced the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act, a wealth tax, which would raise $3 trillion over 10 years?and would only apply to fortunes of $50 million or more. Here's how it would work:
* The wealth tax would only be paid by about 100,000 taxpayers?the richest 0.05%
* The tax rate would be just 2 cents on the dollar (2%) for people with wealth between $50 million and $1 billion
* The tax rate would be just 3 cents on the dollar (3%) for wealth above $1 billion

Currently, many ultra-millionaires and billionaires pay an overall tax rate that is about the same as many middle-class people. That's because most of the wealth of the ultra-rich is generated by investments in stocks and other assets. When the very rich sell those investments for profit, they pay a tax rate that's roughly half the rate that you and I pay on work income. What can we do with $3 trillion over 10 years? We could fully fund President Biden's healthcare public option, lower the Medicare eligibility age to 60, improve the affordability of elder care and long-term care, and expand rural-health and mental health services, and fight the opioid epidemic. Or, we could put $2 trillion toward repairing our crumbling national infrastructure while putting the additional $1 trillion toward creating a green energy economy. Or, we could strengthen public education, make childcare affordable for all working families, provide universal preschool and free public community college, while also wiping out a lot of student debt. Together, we have an incredible opportunity to pass meaningful tax reform in 2021 and to create a tax system and economy that works for everyone, not just the wealthy few. Become a grassroots co-signer of Elizabeth Warren's, Pramila Jayapal's and Brendan Boyle's wealth tax today to generate $3 trillion over 10 years to invest in our country's future. [ADD YOUR NAME](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165471.545693.14&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18236) . We really appreciate your participation in this petition, as we expand our efforts to**identify every Democratic voter in the US to make sure they vote for Democrats in every election.** If you'd like to help us organize, [please join our Facebook community](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165471.545693.14&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18237). Thanks for all you do! | ****| **Bob Fertik, President**
---|---

We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. New York, NY 10276

name: Ralph Northam
subject: WATCH: Abolishing the Death Penalty at 2:00
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3gMLWbg5YJSu3uGY6MjTwkkA0z-P7Vde6XgBwosjdc=/YZCPyBsZU5ngsiL05RfFFVbWXzaHofvIXiWkqtrDUb4=)
---
Friend, It is vital that our criminal justice system operates fairly and punishes people equitably. We all know the death penalty doesn't do that. It is inequitable, ineffective, and inhumane. Over Virginia's long history, this Commonwealth has executed more people than any other state. And, like many other states, Virginia has come too close to executing an innocent person. It's time we stop this machinery of death. Today, Virginia will become the first state in the South to abolish the death penalty, joining 22 other states in banning capital punishment. This is an important step forward in ensuring that our criminal justice system is fair and equitable to all. **Please join us virtually today at 2:00pm as I sign this historic piece of legislation to abolish the death penalty by clicking[ here](https://act.myngp.com/el/i3gMLWbg5YJSu3uGY6MjTwkkA0z-P7Vde6XgBwosjdc=/fwOYuZyUTUwuy_GFLF-1z6GwEyAyV3jFVo_8lhBJqRU=).** \- Ralph Northam

Mark Warner and his fellow Senate Democrats were extremely proud to pass the American Rescue Plan and help deliver shots in arms and money in pockets.

**[As stimulus checks start arriving in bank accounts and vaccine distribution scales up, can you let Mark know how the new law will help you and/or your family? Take the survey now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26675790/277699220/814011843?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU2YWQ4Mi1iNjhjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGgahX57zTqDTCbzvmfdUwGY4gsmrzGAzJoCn7d_2g8=&emci=038e9da5-098c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=3056ad82-b68c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=4568237)**

Mark was able to secure much-needed funds for our Commonwealth in the plan, including:
* Relief checks for over **_3,611,000_** households across VA
* **_$6.8 billion_** in state and local government funding
* **_$2.9 billion_** for education
* **_$1.3 billion_** in rural transit funding
* **_$1.5 billion_** in urban transit funding
* And **_$451 million_** in emergency rental assistance

Other provisions in the ARP included:
* **_$17 billion_** to increase affordability and access to broadband across America, including right here in our Commonwealth (where 700,000 Virginians are still unable to access high-speed internet)
* **_$7.25 billion_** additional funds earmarked for the Paycheck Protection Program
* And **_$28.6 billion_** to create a Restaurant Revitalization Fund

**[If the American Rescue Plan will benefit you and/or your family, tell Mark Warner today by filling out his survey.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26675791/277699221/814011843?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDU2YWQ4Mi1iNjhjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wGgahX57zTqDTCbzvmfdUwGY4gsmrzGAzJoCn7d_2g8=&emci=038e9da5-098c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=3056ad82-b68c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=4568237)**

**StopJoe.com // ABOUT THE RED WAVE FUND**

Our future is hanging by a thread, and Democrats are preparing to give it everything they've got in order to break past their 50+1 majority in the Senate.

So if we lose just ONE Senate seat next year, Joe Biden's expanded Majority will be very powerful.

Democrats will be able to pass their dream slate of far-left garbage...and it's game OVER for the America First Agenda.

As a fellow Republican, you know how important it is that we hit the ground running to win back the Senate. **We are only $5,546 away from having the budget to open our first field office.** We need your **HELP** today to push our campaign to the next level.

**This is your chance to get in on the ground floor -- literally -- and get our first office up and running!** Field offices are among the most important parts of campaigns. It's how we get out the vote, knock on doors, make calls, pass out yard signs, and reach voters. The earlier we open this field office, the more equipped we are to stave off the Democrats.

Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi are already gearing up to take Senator Rubio down. **We cannot afford to lose this fight. **
Join us in the fight against the Washington Elite and fight to take back the Senate. _**[Each dollar could mean another yard sign, another bumper sticker, another phone call, and make the difference between opening a field office and staying dark.](http://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/field-office/?utm_campaign=20210324_TY.100609_mark-campaign-manager_t1053355-564&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210324_get-in-on-the-ground-floor-literally style= "Each dollar could mean another yard sign, another bumper sticker, another phone call, and make the difference between opening a field office and staying dark.")**_

This increasingly aggressive turn has made our country start to move in the wrong direction as a free-market and democratic power.

**The only way to hold the Democrats accountable is to vote them out, but** we need your help to complete just as important missions. Friend, Washington Democrats are funneling MASSIVE amounts of money to smear my name and take me out of office. Why? Because they're _barely_ holding onto the House Majority... _and they 're terrified._ That's why they're willing to do and spend whatever it takes to keep control -- even if that means attacking me with lies. We rely on supporters like you to continue our fight against these smear campaigns. Your support is the only reason I'm in Congress today and it's the only way I'll be able to serve again. I'm personally asking you -- [**Will you chip in $25 to further our efforts? Anything you can give helps tremendously.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_NhIeHnPwDXlXzTfVZnrbIgisNmgtVHCx_jt-C8m_xzuMC3f3HwvGvgzqmY9_hOkbI6qFyVWJvynFK-YDJ6WSRTuzIsFgZIM94CZSiOj9iAhN15SoTTx8_pwp0sV4NJzNYOfRjfsNT167VP90tixz8BFXBBkcSDz-F-u9Er68wZWcrvSv1Biw_9TV4B6cFyE29lsUWNbboKn_AYfvX5UuTYttzzKEnMc5SLKJ1XJaGcoBAw4vtmBLJwPxlfNp4RtLq9TLnlUVOkLX_SYtiETS5f2e5XJNMmpGPZ6FhE3ZfKw5VhHBrHKKDY6eIu0jU3g1-3ET5BYe3KHqRmtHDbPLKXbg8NjLSWUg-u_SRpjBZ3xAjM2B5hvX8heFHtaR3Q4c_yK7fz_3VCKaH9gpfonQlVfTyCUT8UKRNtcfJoCv8rHsFm_j2F7GqJ-Rew9s6_YTYILFUS0hsY=&c=QFVGV_KiRVScCKg60V6QMf6dTa9sXR7F83bOKpCBMKLiBq9CDHIoMg==&ch=0XS1Gq2X1Dy1yRjoAs_nBldAeSxcAKf3Nv37N8MFqSm9dbFCukUE7w==) | [**CHIP IN $25**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_NhIeHnPwDXlXzTfVZnrbIgisNmgtVHCx_jt-C8m_xzuMC3f3HwvGlQ5ouxHneuQfNFvx4gt0-VzPjWViYiwTT8b7CCyzXqMDJVUZmjUh0fCTGZ2PTnIiCevM3hYQk0cyG16jrK1eVIjhBVqVY8q6YD-9MrCe2O6wVd9kZOAAqmIfoomt3TyexZjsvQkaQATtNoxnjO1gx0BF2ZAnFTJ4QfcRyBaxpgwCa8X0UboyhFEmAjsKyNYZrd20SZrIprQIuZnvfDPkeSS8EXRlRVsEP70hYGYAg7Lnc7OYDhDWsLhGArzdDDScA1cPs0uAc8HOritor_s1gWSOP3JBhSudQpY4j1dQ95BYD859d3-UtSr7uK1AX8fU314QMurqOMArix-IA7Cn4mHoUyXecfAV9FIX_htnKD0A8-WCGtaSxaQt78gWg7JJUrjiHNHneDlZK3yz-OqCGE=&c=QFVGV_KiRVScCKg60V6QMf6dTa9sXR7F83bOKpCBMKLiBq9CDHIoMg==&ch=0XS1Gq2X1Dy1yRjoAs_nBldAeSxcAKf3Nv37N8MFqSm9dbFCukUE7w==)

[**CHIP IN $25**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_NhIeHnPwDXlXzTfVZnrbIgisNmgtVHCx_jt-C8m_xzuMC3f3HwvGlQ5ouxHneuQfNFvx4gt0-VzPjWViYiwTT8b7CCyzXqMDJVUZmjUh0fCTGZ2PTnIiCevM3hYQk0cyG16jrK1eVIjhBVqVY8q6YD-9MrCe2O6wVd9kZOAAqmIfoomt3TyexZjsvQkaQATtNoxnjO1gx0BF2ZAnFTJ4QfcRyBaxpgwCa8X0UboyhFEmAjsKyNYZrd20SZrIprQIuZnvfDPkeSS8EXRlRVsEP70hYGYAg7Lnc7OYDhDWsLhGArzdDDScA1cPs0uAc8HOritor_s1gWSOP3JBhSudQpY4j1dQ95BYD859d3-UtSr7uK1AX8fU314QMurqOMArix-IA7Cn4mHoUyXecfAV9FIX_htnKD0A8-WCGtaSxaQt78gWg7JJUrjiHNHneDlZK3yz-OqCGE=&c=QFVGV_KiRVScCKg60V6QMf6dTa9sXR7F83bOKpCBMKLiBq9CDHIoMg==&ch=0XS1Gq2X1Dy1yRjoAs_nBldAeSxcAKf3Nv37N8MFqSm9dbFCukUE7w==)

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YvRSbdjLXsgkEdxyl1BXeZTewWuA1RDF8yA3hheIZdSttnwh99EdM8Vd39tOChvf4zsjE9qUjW3hUbgdkE7CaSyAfN7hjXr0DYFN8hQ_-Pdu2wvJMEEFDTSsQ8ZTmzeiy5Yuyu--m3f8BQzv6VzlvcnfdF-iEMDwGdzgnV9WBlilwtlGz6XrddANihCHrFEfpl8eBq8WTE9ZdSgLIZr53jIIxDaHjHpZzDOb6-T-mmqbnDYM0RFNZ0tawMlOeOJdSD-r5FWo0ksXp3ENM9PiiqiB8MwTd4jVYVMbdI3A7UvUhZV7fbTLbF9sU7a4qKEJXA-K_TajnN2XNsh71kQcYMPZmMK1IxTx65i3p3sVFx-43xRZ-QANDjwov-UmAsAvq48luZwkqxwZnkr52WLU_YmN4ldN6I2U5ZM2nSsRJhg=&c=a5Bj7D5cFaRyLqANBNiYbaX27VMRunvTyQJRe5yvzmbBZQ3ZQ_nmoQ==&ch=Hzt1cfOxwQMLK0bbDetSp9Ed3v5V2y8Bhy4a4l408PjzVG8NzlsRdA==)

**So far in this Congress under Nancy Pelosi 's Speakership we have seen partisanship running rampant.**

To her, it's easier to do it alone and push through billions upon billions of dollars of liberal projects rather than finding common-sense solutions with bipartisan support. But from what we've seen from Nancy in the past, this really should not be all that surprising.

Now is the time, though, to send Nancy a message about how the voters of California -- her home state -- really feel about how she is doing as the Speaker of the House of Representatives.

Friend,

When my father endorsed Senator Tim Scott several weeks ago, it was for a VERY good reason. **Tim Scott is one of the best. He FIGHTS to defend our conservative values and constitutional rights.**

Unfortunately, the same radical left that spent hundreds of millions of dollars defaming my family and conservatives like yourself in the last election is now coming after Tim Scott.

**Democrats have already started recruiting radical Senate candidates and liberal donors are getting their checkbooks ready to defeat Tim Scott.**

We may not have the coastal elites on our side like they do, but we do have grassroots patriots like you, Friend.[**Will you chip in to help Tim Scott fight the Democrat attacks against him?**](https://secure.winred.com/tim-scott-for-senate/donald-trump-jr-march/?recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210324_TY.100609_donald-trump-jr._t1053460-1260&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY.100609&utm_content=20210324_tim-scott-is-one-of-the-best)

| Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats want illegal immigrants to vote and expand their voter base. This is their intended consequence.
On top of that, Upwards of 600 unaccompanied minors are showing up at our border EACH DAY.
As a Congressman, it's my duty to keep our country safe, and that means securing the border. I am continuing the fight for security at the border. Joe Biden has betrayed the American people by essentially opening our borders, so it's time to step up.

name: Border Alerts
subject: Biden’s priorities are with anyone but Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rutledge for Governor
body:
And his immigration policy proves it
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hsztE2pGYSDU3YVHcGx7PM3cbc33-Poy0TMMmdzaNvRkN6b_lgT4pW4CJSPP6UQGgj5l8zaf7iHrszoYjtrfolUOFuQJaQ-_v2CPsYkSaiShIUturUwzKnY3mLtPTaxxiGTrmMYxLkdLrUW2RKRiQMYXTswSUWuVZSxlFyfIpWOipQWRHT16Wo2ARAHBQJDrH2_AEJQBsboL7KsjmJbT3WnHqsEOTdMS2fHHmHkanklfLp9Y9NviYYGLuf6YMXPuSiPshYPQ0118ic57Ja_fdzCBByk2J0DLNSbqAtGnCEV30QSza5v-S4fZotWLCFtjtWVQZ3lOjxXdUnWbZu-opoL8HiDHaakApdPYNIJiKYMskZ5hrOYrwb7JaM63gs8Hu8_8L0XNzjeOSN2Hgo4VHMU7hlpQRakftcXbbrJuVr9uxEPHylHXj4kFEIaOi4mgxXGQsDogZ7tQ2wkM9DLl9j5GBHMTdSyED0-4Y2ex5f0UXVxxOSEZkv81k2e9Mzol&c=tqsaA7oq-Ge_4oxWNAfNQKZ1i3dli1Uqbuu1aeekEKjpZUFNlRY1cQ==&ch=PJlyktUPQkSVTmwHtHYmDP2A8rVkV3F15pGSiWjEFZRfeujoaqUaSw==)
Friend, this is unacceptable.

While our country is facing a destructive pandemic and massive unemployment, Joe Biden and his cronies are busy with their far-left immigration agenda. What's the agenda? _**Opening our borders and giving amnesty to MILLIONS of illegal immigrants.**_

Joe Biden and the rest of the left have completely abandoned their responsibilities to the American public. Instead, they're doing everything they can to encourage illegal immigrants to come here. They even want to abolish Immigration and Customs Enforcement, so that ANY person who wants to come into our country can just walk right in.
[**STOP THE LEFT 'S RIDICULOUS IMMIGRATION POLICIES**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hsztE2pGYSDU3YVHcGx7PM3cbc33-Poy0TMMmdzaNvRkN6b_lgT4pW4CJSPP6UQGgj5l8zaf7iHrszoYjtrfolUOFuQJaQ-_v2CPsYkSaiShIUturUwzKnY3mLtPTaxxiGTrmMYxLkdLrUW2RKRiQMYXTswSUWuVZSxlFyfIpWOipQWRHT16Wo2ARAHBQJDrH2_AEJQBsboL7KsjmJbT3WnHqsEOTdMS2fHHmHkanklfLp9Y9NviYYGLuf6YMXPuSiPshYPQ0118ic57Ja_fdzCBByk2J0DLNSbqAtGnCEV30QSza5v-S4fZotWLCFtjtWVQZ3lOjxXdUnWbZu-opoL8HiDHaakApdPYNIJiKYMskZ5hrOYrwb7JaM63gs8Hu8_8L0XNzjeOSN2Hgo4VHMU7hlpQRakftcXbbrJuVr9uxEPHylHXj4kFEIaOi4mgxXGQsDogZ7tQ2wkM9DLl9j5GBHMTdSyED0-4Y2ex5f0UXVxxOSEZkv81k2e9Mzol&c=tqsaA7oq-Ge_4oxWNAfNQKZ1i3dli1Uqbuu1aeekEKjpZUFNlRY1cQ==&ch=PJlyktUPQkSVTmwHtHYmDP2A8rVkV3F15pGSiWjEFZRfeujoaqUaSw==)
The left has done everything short of hanging up welcome banners and giving illegal immigrants a free ride across the border. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Affordable, quality health care (open until 5/15)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
There are big changes that could really help you or your family.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/x4r9S2LYrPsy/ZWNqOUF1VE1KRmlDMlQ3c2tvQVR1TWltZERQaVdqbDZOcGJvTmZJQlFVc2tUZzJRVUdZTkszQmwzZTl6eDdIQ3FxeHg5Z1V3ZkI4UTNTMUZrNm01L1l5QmIrQWt1TUl5dFd0L1BleHJjQjQ9S0/WUpjQy92V1FCRHpJaml0ckE0UVlLRWNSenNxY3lxTTlkRExVTFk0Nm5oUT0S1) Friend, Eleven years ago yesterday, the Affordable Care Act was signed into law. Since then, it's made a huge impact on the lives of so many Washingtonians. Here in Washington state, the rate of people without insurance decreased from 14% in 2010 to an all-time low of 5.4% in 2016. Our work has provided health insurance to 750,000 more Washingtonians. That's tremendous progress. Now it will get even better: Since the Democrats passed the American Rescue Plan earlier this month, many Americans will see expanded health care coverage as well as lower cost premiums and plans. Importantly, for low-income individuals, couples, and families, monthly premiums will drop dramatically, by the hundreds each month. President Biden also recently opened a special enrollment period that allows Americans to sign up for health care through the exchanges until May 15, and so far, more than 200,000 Americans have signed up, including many thousands in Washington state. **But there 's more work to do to get the word out. If you or someone you love needs health care coverage at an affordable price, take a look today at the [Washington Health Plan Finder if you're in Washington state](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3h~dKYxF0/ZWNqOUF1VE1KRmlDMlQ3c2tvQVR1TWltZERQaVdqbDZOcGJvTmZJQlFVc2tUZzJRVUdZTkszQmwzZTl6eDdIQ3FxeHg5Z1V3ZkI4UTNTMUZrNm01L1l5QmIrQWt1TUl5dFd0L1BleHJjQjQ9S0/) or [Healthcare.gov if you live elsewhere.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/34WRSNLg2_Je/ZWNqOUF1VE1KRmlDMlQ3c2tvQVR1TWltZERQaVdqbDZOcGJvTmZJQlFVc2tUZzJRVUdZTkszQmwzZTl6eDdIQ3FxeHg5Z1V3ZkI4UTNTMUZrNm01L1l5QmIrQWt1TUl5dFd0L1BleHJjQjQ9S0/)** The marketplaces are open until May 15th -- don't miss your chance to find good coverage at an affordable price. Very truly yours, Jay
---

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Join Cory Booker, Mark Kelly, and me on April 7th for a SPRING INTO SERVICE virtual rally with Taking the Hill!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking the Hill
body:
Peter,

The veterans of Taking the Hill are proud to invite you to our first big event of the spring - a [_**SPRING INTO SERVICE**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fndN9yKlLxxT617A91yHWNUqY3rET749fMy6tqAMNio=/zqVaHj_rYEly_ksmoVgMUgEkNd4ihB26W5PEeRTPDX4=) virtual rally with Senators **Cory Booker** and **Mark Kelly**!

As the weather gets warmer and thaws out those of us in the Northeast, we are reminded of the opportunities that a new season brings. Here at Taking the Hill, we are working to bring the opportunity of political public service to more veterans and military family members of integrity - and we are proud to have the support and friendship of Senator Booker and Senator Kelly in that mission!

Our work to establish a majority of integrity in the U.S. Senate is already in high gear. In order to succeed, we need to raise as much as we can for this event. [_**Will you purchase a ticket or become an event sponsor to help us guarantee veterans and military family members on the ballot win and bring integrity back to government? Click here to help us raise at least $20,000 to meet our goals!**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/fndN9yKlLxxT617A91yHWNUqY3rET749fMy6tqAMNio=/zqVaHj_rYEly_ksmoVgMUgEkNd4ihB26W5PEeRTPDX4=)

[**Date: Wednesday, April 7th
Time: 7:30 pm - 8:30 pm
Location: Zoom!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fndN9yKlLxxT617A91yHWNUqY3rET749fMy6tqAMNio=/zqVaHj_rYEly_ksmoVgMUgEkNd4ihB26W5PEeRTPDX4=)

Thank you for helping us welcome Spring and support our candidates with a celebration of service!

In solidarity,
Patrick

The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
32nd Under Secretary of the Army
Former Congressman (PA-01)
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/fndN9yKlLxxT617A91yHWNUqY3rET749fMy6tqAMNio=/MAbC05ol_ESR32cLL8MOkxO_EKpmGSJtTSBj3ZmiMRk=)

Paid for by Taking the Hill
---
Taking the Hill
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/fndN9yKlLxxT617A91yHWNUqY3rET749fMy6tqAMNio=/y-5svZIQ5ar8USezcQA3L6BgkuD9xqaXVhWqVjONarY=).

Our work to establish a majority of integrity in the U.S. Senate is already in high gear. In order to succeed, we need to raise as much as we can for this event. = = Thank you for helping us welcome Spring and support our candidates with a celebration of service! In solidarity, Patrick The Honorable Patrick J. Murphy 32nd Under Secretary of the Army Former Congressman (PA-01) = Paid for by Taking the Hill Taking the Hill PO Box 2134 Bristol PA 19007 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Team Cammack
subject: The American People feel disrespected
body:
The crisis at the border is a real problem
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gK6CIbF38AEjnt96mlaUqoMkKmKKpK8kNMoxpn6FqFmS3T38fnZEltwCGAJkLJtAkjsQmSMBm-L-HyxWkoDNfzCnEgbnIu6_0HyJaKq6ijw99z2H2MV9ezHU9HDuBliaSOmGhfw1cUUZl66ohHGTXmsSnZE9uy7ISAaBBkoPEqMrm7VExkF6CXkezvSdxZ2M&c=oa0iKVGavRPncOJSnSaLsZFF_T_sLV6Qf8MXv4ODCmjNo4iHl8msEA==&ch=0OsL3pguTVebCOH2kY-WyccmK6bt0ww3DO-Q9eVzGQeEWVctZC3FnA==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
DHS Secretary Mayorkas got his feelings hurt when Kat asked some hard-hitting questions during a Homeland Security Committee meeting. He went so far as to say her questions were, "[extremely disrespectful.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gK6CIbF38AEjnt96mlaUqoMkKmKKpK8kNMoxpn6FqFmS3T38fnZEltwCGAJkLJtALsnWk3G08585GhfGqasq2jlJ7r7y-swQxFyRdvI5IbbfvKiPvx3Y6yugEwQozxm0WkW5SgMp2zTtWVUsHYUZUhpIyd6zwGbMVm-wKNgnGMhV8cRNbeC0wAaG33zx9JJO63USK-LlBj-GL-Oa-3oyNx7ZaSJe3yy8&c=oa0iKVGavRPncOJSnSaLsZFF_T_sLV6Qf8MXv4ODCmjNo4iHl8msEA==&ch=0OsL3pguTVebCOH2kY-WyccmK6bt0ww3DO-Q9eVzGQeEWVctZC3FnA==&jrc=1)"
The real disrespect is Mayorkas ignoring the crisis at the border. The Biden Administration needs to be held accountable. [Sign the petition if you agree!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gK6CIbF38AEjnt96mlaUqoMkKmKKpK8kNMoxpn6FqFmS3T38fnZEltwCGAJkLJtAkjsQmSMBm-L-HyxWkoDNfzCnEgbnIu6_0HyJaKq6ijw99z2H2MV9ezHU9HDuBliaSOmGhfw1cUUZl66ohHGTXmsSnZE9uy7ISAaBBkoPEqMrm7VExkF6CXkezvSdxZ2M&c=oa0iKVGavRPncOJSnSaLsZFF_T_sLV6Qf8MXv4ODCmjNo4iHl8msEA==&ch=0OsL3pguTVebCOH2kY-WyccmK6bt0ww3DO-Q9eVzGQeEWVctZC3FnA==&jrc=1)

| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gK6CIbF38AEjnt96mlaUqoMkKmKKpK8kNMoxpn6FqFmS3T38fnZEltwCGAJkLJtAkjsQmSMBm-L-HyxWkoDNfzCnEgbnIu6_0HyJaKq6ijw99z2H2MV9ezHU9HDuBliaSOmGhfw1cUUZl66ohHGTXmsSnZE9uy7ISAaBBkoPEqMrm7VExkF6CXkezvSdxZ2M&c=oa0iKVGavRPncOJSnSaLsZFF_T_sLV6Qf8MXv4ODCmjNo4iHl8msEA==&ch=0OsL3pguTVebCOH2kY-WyccmK6bt0ww3DO-Q9eVzGQeEWVctZC3FnA==&jrc=1)
---
| We don't need to hear about Mayorkas' feelings. Our Border Patrol and Homeland Security officials are not receiving the support they need to secure our Southern Border, and that's because of the Biden Administration's negligence.
Here in America, public servants are accountable to the People. We want to know why the Biden Administration is ignoring the crisis at our Southern Border, and we demand answers!
If YOU feel disrespected by the Biden Administration ignoring the Crisis at our Southern Border and want to hold them accountable, sign our petition today!

subject: A message from Lynette Feenstra
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=2f2f4885ae&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| | Friend,
The sanctity of life is not determined by any court or legislation in America, but by the creator of life itself. Unfortunately, it falls to the state to protect life from those who want to destroy it. Every year, millions of babies are aborted. In the Iowa Senate, Randy worked hard to make sure our state doesn't contribute to the death count, and now as our Congressman, he's doing everything he can to end this vile practice nationwide. As a mother, I have watched my children grow, from only a heartbeat on a monitor to wonderful young adults. But my belief in protecting the unborn comes from a deeper place than parenthood; it comes from our Creator God who promises us that each life is fearfully and wonderfully made.
---
| [ ](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=75b6610a2f&e=d48ad6f8f4)
---
| As a human being, I will honor every life the way our Heavenly Father does. Randy is on the front lines, fighting to protect life. He has and will oppose abortion bills in the House and actively fight for pro-life legislation that provides resources and options for mothers in crisis, giving every child a chance at life. If this cause means as much to you as it does to me, [**will you support Randy and ensure he will continue being our voice and standing tall for life?**](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=ec3bbe49b7&e=d48ad6f8f4)

Lynette Feenstra

name: Susan Wild
subject: Enough gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
We passed this legislation before, but it was blocked in the Senate by Mitch McConnell. Now, we have a chance to make Universal Background Checks into law and save lives.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26691095/277754463/665915877?refcode=BLU-SWC-20210324-1-EM&amount=25&header=Donate to Susan Wild&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU0ZGNhZC1lODhjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlLXd6u3w-okYq6SrGRGQcJSOqKAltQZ7Rf_RIUB5SU=)
---
| Peter,

On Monday, yet another mass shooting took place, in a supermarket in Boulder, Colorado. This tragedy took place less than a week after the senseless mass shooting in Atlanta, targeting Asian American women.

Nobody should have to feel like they are putting their lives at risk by going to a grocery store, going to work or school, or anywhere else.

Today, my heart goes out to the victims and their families. But more than that, I promise to take action to prevent future tragedies.

I’m proud to have cosponsored legislation to ban assault weapons like the one used in Boulder. And last week, I joined my colleagues in the House again to pass legislation that would expand background checks, and close dangerous loopholes that allow criminals to get guns. Now, the legislation will go to the Senate.

We passed this legislation before, but it was blocked in the Senate by Mitch McConnell. Now, we have a chance to make Universal Background Checks into law and save lives.

These measures are common sense. Over 90% of Americans, including gun owners, support expanding background checks. It’s long past time for us to pass laws that will keep our families safe.

_**[Peter, will you sign your name and ask the Senate to vote yes to pass lifesaving Universal Background Checks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/26691096/277754464/-2002328523?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU0ZGNhZC1lODhjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlLXd6u3w-okYq6SrGRGQcJSOqKAltQZ7Rf_RIUB5SU=&emci=d577fbef-e48c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=aae4dcad-e88c-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=5543981)**_

Thank you,
Susan Wild

Now, we have a chance to make Universal Background Checks into law and save lives. | to Susan Wild&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYWU0ZGNhZC1lODhjLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDE1NWQ0M2M5OTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlLXd6u3w-okYq6SrGRGQcJSOqKAltQZ7RfRIUB5SU= | Peter, On Monday, yet another mass shooting took place, in a supermarket in Boulder, Colorado. This tragedy took place less than a week after the senseless mass shooting in Atlanta, targeting Asian American women. Nobody should have to feel like they are putting their lives at risk by going to a grocery store, going to work or school, or anywhere else. Today, my heart goes out to the victims and their families. But more than that, I promise to take action to prevent future tragedies. I’m proud to have cosponsored legislation to ban assault weapons like the one used in Boulder. And last week, I joined my colleagues in the House again to pass legislation that would expand background checks, and close dangerous loopholes that allow criminals to get guns. Now, the legislation will go to the Senate. We passed this legislation before, but it was blocked in the Senate by Mitch McConnell. Now, we have a chance to make Universal Background Checks into law and save lives. These measures are common sense. Over 90% of Americans, including gun owners, support expanding background checks. It’s long past time for us to pass laws that will keep our families safe. Thank you, Susan Wild | | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. name: =?utf-8?Q?Zephyr=20Teachout?=
subject: Join Rep. Cori Bush, Me, Economic Liberties & People's Action for the next “Break ‘Em Up" Event!
body:
How Health Care Monopolies Hurt Patients, Health Care Workers, and Communities

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/5d09e25be9f0/join-rep-cori-bush-me-economic-liberties-peoples-action-for-the-next-break-em-up-event?e=e870238275)
RSVP (https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN__86DTVy6SMS2LgMU0EyDkw?emci=93ba5696-c088-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=3055180)

COVID-19 has levied a heavy toll on the health of our country over the past year, particularly for communities of color. Some of the challenges in managing the pandemic are because of our reliance on a private insurance system, which impacts access and costs of care. But poor outcomes, high costs, and lack of access are caused or exacerbated by a problem that policymakers could begin to address today—unchecked monopoly power.

Long before the pandemic, from hospitals to Big Pharma to medical supplies, the extreme market power of large corporations that put profits over people hurt patients, health care workers, and communities. If we don't break these giants up, these monopolies will continue using their power to limit access to care and create medical deserts, while raising costs, lowering quality of care, and abusing health care workers.

On March 30 at 2:00 p.m. ET, please join Economic Liberties, People’s Action, Congresswoman Cori Bush (MO-01), and leading experts and advocates to learn why we need leaders at all levels of government to fight corporate health care monopolies to make our health care system more equitable and resilient. This is the second event in our Break ‘Em Up: Redistributing Power to the People series, which highlights how progressives can organize around anti-monopoly fights to advance economic and racial justice. The first (https://www.economicliberties.us/event/break-em-up-redistributing-economic-power-to-the-people/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) focused on how to center worker rights in corporate power fights.

Date: March 30, 2021

Time: 2:00 - 3:30 PM ET
RSVP (https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN__86DTVy6SMS2LgMU0EyDkw?emci=93ba5696-c088-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=3055180)

Opening Remarks:

Sarah Miller (https://www.economicliberties.us/sarah-miller/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Director, American Economic Liberties Project

Keynote Remarks:

Congresswoman Cori Bush (MO-01) (https://bush.house.gov/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , member of the House Judiciary and Oversight and Reform Committees

2:15pm - Panel 1: How Health Care Monopolies Worsened the Impact of COVID-19

Jean Ross (https://www.nationalnursesunited.org/about?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , RN, President, National Nurses United

Abdul El Sayed (http://abdulelsayed.com/about?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Physician, Epidemiologist, Former City Health Commissioner, Progressive Activist, Author of The Incision (https://incision.substack.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) and Medicare for All: A Citizen’s Guide (http://medicareforallbook.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) & host of the podcast “America Dissected.”

Zephyr Teachout (https://www.fordham.edu/info/23186/zephyr_teachout?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Professor, Fordham Law School and author of Break 'Em Up: Recovering Our Freedom from Big Ag, Big Tech, and Big Money (https://us.macmillan.com/books/9781250200891?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}})

Moderated by Morgan Harper (https://www.economicliberties.us/morgan-harper/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Advisor, American Economic Liberties Project

2:45pm - Panel 2: Solutions to Tackle Monopoly Power in the Health Care Industry

Lisa Frank (https://www.uniteforpa.com/meet_lisa_frank?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Vice President and Director of Strategic Campaigns, SEIU PA

Olivia Webb (https://www.economicliberties.us/olivia-webb/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Policy Analyst, American Economic Liberties Project

Mike Bowen (https://www.dallasnews.com/news/2020/05/14/two-years-ago-mike-bowen-of-prestige-ameritech-warned-of-n-95-mask-shortages-heres-what-he-said/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Executive Vice President, Prestige Ameritech

Moderated by George Goehl (https://peoplesaction.org/about/george-goehl-executive-director/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Director, People’s Action

Closing Remarks:

Morgan Harper (https://www.economicliberties.us/morgan-harper/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , Senior Advisor, American Economic Liberties Project

Additional Resources from Economic Liberties:

Courage to Learn: Health Care, (https://www.economicliberties.us/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/Courage-to-Learn_HealthCare_Designed_1.11.pdf?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) American Economic Liberties Project

“A Shot in the Arm: How Government Succeed in Coronavirus Vaccine Development, and Failed in Distribution (https://prospect.org/coronavirus/shot-in-the-arm-coronavirus-vaccine-development/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) ,” The American Prospect

Acute Condition (https://www.acutecondition.com/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) , newsletter by Economic Liberties’ Olivia Webb

About the “Break ‘Em Up” Series:

Economic Liberties and People's Action's “Break ‘Em Up!” series brings together a diverse range of progressive voices to share information about the ways unchecked corporate power is hurting workers, small businesses, communities, and our democracy. Watch our previous event on taking on monopolies to strengthen worker power, featuring Senator Bernie Sanders, here (https://www.economicliberties.us/event/break-em-up-redistributing-economic-power-to-the-people/?emci=099e9649-328b-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid={{ContactsEmailID}}) .
RSVP (https://us02web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN__86DTVy6SMS2LgMU0EyDkw?emci=93ba5696-c088-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=3055180)

body:

Peter,
Democrats are coming for your guns.

Democrats never let a tragedy pass by without attempting to leverage for more control, and this time **the 2nd Amendment is square in the sights of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer**.

Those **out-of-touch coastal elite liberals** have been scheming against the 2nd Amendment for years, but this time they have more power.

I won’t let them get away without a fight.

They want a national gun registry at the very least, with the potential for a full-on nationwide gun confiscation.

**[WATCH Josh Hawley on Fox News: “We know the left wants to confiscate guns — their presidential candidates ran on that last year.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=aca133961e0440b39d2908f7b2e3af94&_e=vOba5yZJmTylwSolZBSFvF8kPRTw5cIoHhm-Z02YPoIzzOEtFLKJ5OmlOQmP1bqrfQSBeV0EpwjUVIO3bC5-G8YUwZ2KOw_-IKNv17TEiN--7OUnDycd2pVRdXJOF3YQKrZxJB9gc9L_rGcqLFpZYC0SKB_wI51kkQ8oJ0ry_ZKtz8xTF-VhAVT2a3v-yZoHPgNxngJ-rwI8dBDJz-5d3rMk7rV6Z5zAA4Odd-hne1OAy0EKBdX6l_XgFno30DQARVtVDmlXZChzJSIu_RDFiGm0ofKlFeR4duaz4b21mADSUzt-MxQUZVqYJLquoShYIwLV3ZnlWMqc7db35uxvO6GClcOEq6q1ozuochksNj_fmz-dCVakANeek2d8Owr5Jj_CvPVKgd2IfedbxToqOXX-GLR0-6Xh6mnlhC1F9g4%3D) **

This massive, unconstitutional power-grab is unacceptable.

I will continue to fight for the continued protections for the 2nd Amendment rights of law-abiding citizens.

Join me and help fight Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer’s **UNCONSTITUTIONAL GUN GRAB**.

[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=aca133961e0440b39d2908f7b2e3af94&_e=vOba5yZJmTylwSolZBSFvF8kPRTw5cIoHhm-Z02YPoIzzOEtFLKJ5OmlOQmP1bqrfQSBeV0EpwjUVIO3bC5-G8YUwZ2KOw_-IKNv17TEiN--7OUnDycd2pVRdXJOF3YQKrZxJB9gc9L_rGcqLFpZYC0SKB_wI51kkQ8oJ0ry_ZKtz8xTF-VhAVT2a3v-yZoHck7Vi1u-JPEqhbvir1z1l2nJr9JvJSDppJYvbSbAlz_3w1EI4srxOH4GEY6LXnxN5Re1rfYUC1uTEjlO6sA4GuUU7B9rgBwUuAn4E4iWE-c2-QA3QIzucvYAmByBOH3P0Epux1-eXUJGmrO0ApgVqC_ewfwJmTxezn7JyqJ_tzmwHW6horrFWEX5jMdSC9Wg_9Do7y1dCS2fWwu2YdPOSJPdqkUeYKDd5abA59-rHjI%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

clean_body: Democrats are coming for your guns. | | Peter, Democrats are coming for your guns. Democrats never let a tragedy pass by without attempting to leverage for more control, and this time the 2nd Amendment is square in the sights of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer. Those out-of-touch coastal elite liberals have been scheming against the 2nd Amendment for years, but this time they have more power. I won’t let them get away without a fight. They want a national gun registry at the very least, with the potential for a full-on nationwide gun confiscation. This massive, unconstitutional power-grab is unacceptable. I will continue to fight for the continued protections for the 2nd Amendment rights of law-abiding citizens. Join me and help fight Biden, Pelosi, and Schumer’s UNCONSTITUTIONAL GUN GRAB. Thank you, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Public University, Pharmacy Apologize for Denying Illegal Immigrants U.S.-Funded COVID-19 Vaccine
body:
While frustrated Americans across the country struggle to get their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, a national drug store chain is apologizing for mistakenly denying illegal immigrants the shot.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | March 24, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22450&F=H&)
---
# [Public University, Pharmacy Apologize for Denying Illegal Immigrants U.S.-Funded COVID-19 Vaccine](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22450&F=H&)
While frustrated Americans across the country struggle to get their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, a national drug store chain is apologizing for mistakenly denying illegal immigrants the shot. The pharmacy retail giant, Rite Aid, reportedly turned away two women at separate stores in southern California. In one of the cases, the illegal immigrant provided a foreign identification card that is not valid in the U.S. The pharmacist insisted on a social security card, telling the woman that American citizens have priority, according to a local news report. The woman’s son complained about the pharmacist on social media and a local congressman got involved, confirming that there is no legal residence requirement at the federal, state, or local level.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22450&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [How H.R.1 intends to overturn Supreme Court rulings on elections ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22451&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvaHIxLXNjb3R1cy1ydWxpbmdzLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyNDIwMDYyMA==) The Hill Ever since House Resolution 1, the Democrats’ 886-page partisan wish list of a voting bill, passed the House on a party-line vote earlier this month, its critics have had a lot to say. They correctly point out that the bill federalizes election law on a historically unprecedented scale, systematically impairs existing federal and state laws concerning election integrity, and imposes new burdens and restrictions on political speech and activity. All of this is apparent from the text of the bill. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22451&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvaHIxLXNjb3R1cy1ydWxpbmdzLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDMyNDIwMDYyMA==)
---
### [Judicial Watch Lawsuit: 2,400 Illegal Alien Criminals Released under San Francisco Sheriff’s Office Sanctuary Policy ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22452&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvMjQwMC1hbGllbi1jcmltaW5hbHMtcmVsZWFzZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjQyMDA2MjA=) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced its taxpayer lawsuit against the San Francisco Sheriff’s sanctuary policy uncovered that over 2,400 criminal illegal aliens were released under the department’s policy on communications with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) about criminal illegal aliens in the Sheriff’s custody. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22452&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvMjQwMC1hbGllbi1jcmltaW5hbHMtcmVsZWFzZWQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMjQyMDA2MjA=)
---
### [Judicial Watch Sues Georgia Secretary of State for Records about Changes to Processing of Absentee Ballots in 2020 Election, and 2021 Trump/Raffensperger Call ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22453&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvdHJ1bXAtcmFmZmVuc2Jlcmdlci1jYWxsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzI0MjAwNjIw) Judicial Watch “We want to know more about what happened behind the scenes in Georgia during the 2020 election,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Hiding key records about the controversial settlement agreement and the President’s leaked phone call with Raffensperger prevents Americans from knowing the full story and deciding for themselves whether the outcome in Georgia was fair.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53233&L=22453&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvdHJ1bXAtcmFmZmVuc2Jlcmdlci1jYWxsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzI0MjAwNjIw)

clean_body: While frustrated Americans across the country struggle to get their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, a national drug store chain is apologizing for mistakenly denying illegal immigrants the shot. | | | Because no one is above the law! | March 24, 2021 ---|---|--- | | While frustrated Americans across the country struggle to get their government-funded COVID-19 vaccine, a national drug store chain is apologizing for mistakenly denying illegal immigrants the shot. The pharmacy retail giant, Rite Aid, reportedly turned away two women at separate stores in southern California. In one of the cases, the illegal immigrant provided a foreign identification card that is not valid in the U.S. The pharmacist insisted on a social security card, telling the woman that American citizens have priority, according to a local news report. The woman’s son complained about the pharmacist on social media and a local congressman got involved, confirming that there is no legal residence requirement at the federal, state, or local level. | | | == The Hill Ever since House Resolution 1, the Democrats’ 886-page partisan wish list of a voting bill, passed the House on a party-line vote earlier this month, its critics have had a lot to say. They correctly point out that the bill federalizes election law on a historically unprecedented scale, systematically impairs existing federal and state laws concerning election integrity, and imposes new burdens and restrictions on political speech and activity. All of this is apparent from the text of the bill. == = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch announced its taxpayer lawsuit against the San Francisco Sheriff’s sanctuary policy uncovered that over 2,400 criminal illegal aliens were released under the department’s policy on communications with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) about criminal illegal aliens in the Sheriff’s custody. = Judicial Watch “We want to know more about what happened behind the scenes in Georgia during the 2020 election,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “Hiding key records about the controversial settlement agreement and the President’s leaked phone call with Raffensperger prevents Americans from knowing the full story and deciding for themselves whether the outcome in Georgia was fair.” = = = = | CLIPS = == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

clean_body: Your efforts are working, but we’re not done yet. | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . Peter -- It’s me, Mariannette Miller-Meeks. I wanted to update you on the status of our efforts to Stop the Pelosi Steal. Over the past few days, and with your help, we’ve been hammering the Democrats for their blatant hypocrisy and drawing national attention to this Steal. And I’m pleased to say that it’s working! The Democrats’ resolve is starting to break, but if we don’t continue calling out their hypocrisy they may still STEAL this election. | STOP THE PELOSI STEAL EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #0329848 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $5 or more | | | | | | | Here are the facts: the Democrats have the votes to steal this election. Our only recourse is to draw as much attention to their hypocrisy as possible and hope that they do what’s right. I refuse to give up or give in. | Thank you. Mariannette Miller-Meeks Duly Elected Member of Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jarrin=20Jackson?=
subject: RINO of the week: "Cocaine Mitch" McConnell (RINO-KY)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
We need conservative Senators! |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=25c8fc8cd8&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi ,

My name is Jarrin Jackson, and I am the Chairman of Drain the DC Swamp PAC who is fighting the radical Left and sellout Republicans and trying to take back the GOP! [I'm going RINO hunting, and I need your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=dba20ab6ec&e=ba6e67b849)!

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is going after some of the worst, most faithless RINOs in DC. The Dems don't have defectors, and neither should we.

Today, I'm gonna tell you this: We need more conservative U.S. Senators- ones that will vote for a new leader, not lame Mitch McConnell.

Now, Kentucky could have elected an ACTUAL conservative. Unfortunately, Mitch isn't up for re-election until 2026. But we can take out other Senate RINOs and replace them with America First conservatives who will elect a different leader.

_**The Dems aren't pulling any punches. They are going extreme and radical right now, and we have to elect leadership who is willing to ram it down the Dems' throats when we have the majority!**_

We know that's not "Cocaine Mitch". And President Trump agrees with us:

_Former President Trump said in a new interview that Republicans need "stronger" and "better" leadership than Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.).

“I think we need better leadership than Mitch McConnell and stronger leadership," Trump said while appearing on “The Truth with Lisa Boothe" podcast.

"I mean, he can't rein in his own people. We have the Mitt Romneys of the world and, you know, the Ben Sasses of the world. These are not good for the Republican Party,” the former president added, referring to Sens. Mitt Romney (R-Utah) and Ben Sasse (R-Neb.).

McConnell, who aligned with Trump while he was in the Oval Office, appeared to break with the former president after the deadly Jan. 6 Capitol breach. McConnell said in February that Trump was "practically and morally responsible for provoking the events of the day." The senator also left open the possibility that Trump, who was impeached over his role in the riot but acquitted in a Senate trial, could face civil or criminal charges.

“In our leadership, Mitch isn’t strong enough to stop people. Never was. That’s like one of the big secrets, but he had the majority, but now that he’s not in the majority, he’s not — he’s not doing his thing.”

**“He’s not doing what he should be doing,” Trump added.**_
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=d26c6f85a9&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| _Mr. President, we agree!_

McConnell remains leader only because of the worst Republicans in the Swamp.

Lisa Murkowski. Ben Sasse. Mitt Romney. Susan Collins. These are the most liberal Republicans in DC, the Never Trumpers, and they are the ones that keep Mitch in power.

**__We have a lot of Republicans up in 2022! We can elect stronger conservatives in Alaska, Alabama, North Carolina, Florida, Arizona, and Georgia.__**

_SENATE SEATS AIN'T CHEAP! We will want to support anti-Mitch, America First conservatives in each state- and that will take money._

Frankly, we want Mitch to fear us!

If Mitch had given Trump the COVID relief bill he wanted, we wouldn't have lost both Georgia seats.

If Mitch had fought for election integrity, we might not have Biden at all!

If Mitch had a spine, we would not have radical abortionist Xavier Becerra as HHS Secretary.

If Mitch had a spine, he would be grinding the Senate to a halt to stop the Democrats' radical agenda. He could also hold legislation hostage to force Biden to address the situation at the border!

**But will Mitch fight? No, he won't. He's too weak, and we need better leadership!**
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=ecad3b0ee4&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **It would be even better if some of the Never Trumpers were intimidated out of running again. That's why we need to show good numbers as our fundraising quarter is coming to a close in a week!**

_Fighting RINOs stops the Democrat agenda, and gives us an America First agenda_.

Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the backbone of the America First movement. We take out the weak sister Republicans and promote strong, pro-Trump leaders!

Leaders like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Ted Cruz, and the Freedom Caucus are what we need more of! [Let's fight back against the weak Republicans!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=f11c07f440&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **President Trump wants the RINOs ousted. He wants a stronger leader than Mitch, and so do we! We are giving muscle to conservatives who are ousting RINOs.[Help us elect strong patriots!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=5d5dd58362&e=ba6e67b849)**

_Mitch surrenders and capitulates. We need a fighter in the Senate!_

The party of Never Trumpers and the Lincoln Project is dead, and good riddance. [Your $25, 50, 100, 250, 500, 1000 or more will help us support better Senators who will give muscle to our majority](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=6db9d6adf3&e=ba6e67b849)!

No more negotiating our country away. The Dems are insane right now, the country demands we fight them. [Help us push forward and fight for America](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=01959d3b3c&e=ba6e67b849)!

Help us meet our goals for the quarter so we can scare some bad Republicans into retirement.

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=ce667025b4&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=002a8e9d01&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| Jarrin Jackson
Combat Veteran
Chairman, Drain the DC Swamp PAC

P.S. Don't be scared by the Establishment. Believe me, they are more scared of us! [Donate right now to help us fight for America.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4fbdd6a9ed&e=ba6e67b849)

"I mean, he can't rein in his own people. We have the Mitt Romneys of the world and, you know, the Ben Sasses of the world. These are not good for the Republican Party,” the former president added, referring to Sens. Mitt Romney (R-Utah) and Ben Sasse (R-Neb.). McConnell, who aligned with Trump while he was in the Oval Office, appeared to break with the former president after the deadly Jan. 6 Capitol breach. McConnell said in February that Trump was "practically and morally responsible for provoking the events of the day." The senator also left open the possibility that Trump, who was impeached over his role in the riot but acquitted in a Senate trial, could face civil or criminal charges. “In our leadership, Mitch isn’t strong enough to stop people. Never was. That’s like one of the big secrets, but he had the majority, but now that he’s not in the majority, he’s not — he’s not doing his thing.” “He’s not doing what he should be doing,” Trump added. | | Mr. President, we agree! McConnell remains leader only because of the worst Republicans in the Swamp. Lisa Murkowski. Ben Sasse. Mitt Romney. Susan Collins. These are the most liberal Republicans in DC, the Never Trumpers, and they are the ones that keep Mitch in power. We have a lot of Republicans up in 2022! We can elect stronger conservatives in Alaska, Alabama, North Carolina, Florida, Arizona, and Georgia. SENATE SEATS AIN'T CHEAP! We will want to support anti-Mitch, America First conservatives in each state- and that will take money. Frankly, we want Mitch to fear us! If Mitch had given Trump the COVID relief bill he wanted, we wouldn't have lost both Georgia seats. If Mitch had fought for election integrity, we might not have Biden at all! If Mitch had a spine, we would not have radical abortionist Xavier Becerra as HHS Secretary. If Mitch had a spine, he would be grinding the Senate to a halt to stop the Democrats' radical agenda. He could also hold legislation hostage to force Biden to address the situation at the border! But will Mitch fight? No, he won't. He's too weak, and we need better leadership! | | It would be even better if some of the Never Trumpers were intimidated out of running again. That's why we need to show good numbers as our fundraising quarter is coming to a close in a week! Fighting RINOs stops the Democrat agenda, and gives us an America First agenda. Drain the DC Swamp PAC is the backbone of the America First movement. We take out the weak sister Republicans and promote strong, pro-Trump leaders! Leaders like Lauren Boebert, Marjorie Taylor Greene, Ted Cruz, and the Freedom Caucus are what we need more of! | President Trump wants the RINOs ousted. He wants a stronger leader than Mitch, and so do we! We are giving muscle to conservatives who are ousting RINOs. Mitch surrenders and capitulates. We need a fighter in the Senate! The party of Never Trumpers and the Lincoln Project is dead, and good riddance. ! No more negotiating our country away. The Dems are insane right now, the country demands we fight them. ! Help us meet our goals for the quarter so we can scare some bad Republicans into retirement. Respectfully, | | Jarrin Jackson Combat Veteran Chairman, Drain the DC Swamp PAC P.S. Don't be scared by the Establishment. Believe me, they are more scared of us! | "DONATE NOW!" | | | | Copyright © 2021 Drain the DC Swamp PAC, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Drain the DC Swamp PAC5 Halifax CtMarlton, NJ 08053-2820 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. Use of the name and likeness of any candidate or officeholder is for the purpose of this PACs political communication only and IN NO WAY indicates any authorization by, affiliation with, direction from, or endorsement by that person of any kind.

name: Pete Snyder

body:
As the first election since Biden and the Democrats took complete control of Washington, the world is watching Virginia. | | |
---|---|---
|
---
Peter,

We are in a mess and the career politicians in Richmond are responsible. When our Commonwealth was confronted with our greatest challenge in a century, the career politicians in Richmond failed every step of the way.
* **_They failed to open our schools._**
* **_They failed to support our small business owners._**
* **_They have infringed on the God-Given rights of Virginians. _**

I'm running to be the next conservative Governor of Virginia to get our Commonwealth leading again and stop the radical Democrats and their allies in the media from continuing to take us further down the road of socialism, higher taxes, and cancel culture.

name: Chairman Stepanek
subject: Stop the Democrats' Gun Grab.
body:
NH Republicans Stand for the 2nd Amendment

**From the Desk of Chairman Stepanek** Derek, This is a bit longer of an email than we normally send, but I wanted to give you an update as to how we're protecting the Second Amendment and Article 2a rights here in New Hampshire. Democrats are doing what they do best: using our mental health crisis to push their extreme agenda to restrict our rights to keep and bear arms. Democrats both Nationally and locally will continue to push their agenda at the cost of your rights - **it’s time to put a stop to this.** As they took back control in D.C. in January the Democrats made it clear that new gun control legislation was an integral part of their agenda. In early March, H.R. 1446 was introduced to the United States House of Representatives, a bill which imposes erroneous restrictions on the Second Amendment. States like Colorado sadly have the most stringent gun control laws on the books but they unfortunately do nothing to prevent criminals from obtaining firearms. These laws only infringe on law-abiding citizens' right to self-defense - the very same patriotic citizens who might prevent tragedies. These proposal just move us one step closer to what Democrats have long sought: a national gun owner registry. It is ironic that the people parroting the phrase “Common Sense Gun Reform” don’t know the first thing about the right to keep and bear arms. Squad Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley (D-MA) was recently quoted as saying, _“The trauma of gun violence in our communities is endless. It’s time we abolish the filibuster and pass meaningful gun control legislation - background checks, automatic weapons ban, gun licensing, and so much more.”_ __ No, Congresswoman Pressley, gun violence is not endless and it’s happening mostly in cities run by Democrats. Any firearm owner could tell you that background checks are already in place. Automatic weapons have been banned in the United States for nearly 40 years. They let slip what they're really after - an end to the filibuster, and free rein to pass whatever legislation they would like. Here in New Hampshire, our local Democrats are no different. Just last year they tried to force through a “Red Flag" law which would have allowed an individual’s firearms to be taken by any judge without due process. Thankfully that bill and other pieces of legislation that infringed on the Second Amendment were vetoed by Governor Chris Sununu. More recently Congressman Chris Pappas has promoted #GunReformNow on twitter, and Ann Kuster has co-sponsored the aforementioned H.R. 1446. If the Democrats have it their way and retake the New Hampshire Legislature in 2022, you can be sure that these radical policies will crop up once more. _By contrast,_ New Hampshire Republicans are taking steps to preserve our Second Amendment and Article 2a rights - even against infringements by the Federal government. Earlier this month, Republicans in the New Hampshire Senate proposed Senate Bill 154 which prohibits the enforcement of any Presidential Executive Order which restricts or regulates the right of the people to keep and bear arms. We view our Second Amendment and Article 2a rights not simply as important rights, but fundamental ones. [Derek, can you donate $20.22, $50, or even $100 today to help us protect the Second Amendment and Article 2a right here in New Hampshire?](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqb5W4qW41pJqq3o6cBtzfaNbqKxjtfGk-2FqSRPPEZHpXM0AP8cecOUNDYquPyIiWop0RI-2FSN1ft9SJRHv4hj70xHTBDF83-2FhBO5GX5gXg1EpA-3DWER8_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HC07YScpb7nQuRbsPi4YzAQz0ph2D9WhATJiNvGVkHnW2DfcHZDYd-2FXlXjn7SosUjXijSRtRtZSnbCZEWieLx89YsSeql1Tws-2FFI4DJXrye5FMW2K1eWnkc4QKEX5nkm7kFwLvRo4h0SbfR87X4WL4K2v2tgxj96gtwkv5tghoK3D6Lj9VfmrDbPUCxLJl9XlCrFxEY2G3yjLOaSy8lSwkOGKKf1PKtKa77X1RqWW2b0YeCiF3Md36IWGSoDwZeC0GzVT1X8s2TvZ-2FbjTmeIkXw-3D-3D) We need to stop the Democrats and their gun grab both in New Hampshire and in D.C. and we need your help to do so. The Democrats are asking for an inch, but they will take a mile as soon as they can.**Once your rights are gone, they’re never going to come back.** [We need your support to fight back against their agenda before it’s too late.](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqb5W4qW41pJqq3o6cBtzfaNbqKxjtfGk-2FqSRPPEZHpXM0AP8cecOUNDYquPyIiWop0RI-2FSN1ft9SJRHv4hj70xHTBDF83-2FhBO5GX5gXg1EpA-3DNd7Y_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HC07YScpb7nQuRbsPi4YzAQz0ph2D9WhATJiNvGVkHnW2DfcHZDYd-2FXlXjn7SosUjXijSRtRtZSnbCZEWieLx81c-2BRC51Z2vc-2BsJB-2Bamwu3-2FWwc-2FRlRS42wZmpOzz6aI2aGEZoqiO1ax5ZbCarYy4lTBmKJahLvAMdnv-2BniW1SoRSz3HV-2F1bJyCf4G8F1vHZQjfSPrc5iAKoy1pxLH4AVGV43axWK8n2rKxlV9BDTHG0A5l35jRXg0c-2FOfsR7OLK-2BkjcZHDR2PbKXeoVtKGwo7g-3D-3D) Regards, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman __ _[P.S. The Democrats are using any excuse necessary to get what they already wanted - gun control. They are already exploiting the tragedies in Colorado and Georgia to propose sweeping gun-control measures which would never have prevented these acts from happening, and would only serve to harm law-abiding citizens. We need your support to fight back and stop the Democrats' proposed gun grab.](http://email.nhgop.org/ls/click?upn=uaUlc6wqPXNLu3PjY1l0S3BDZN-2BK-2F8MQRaPpb5edq5vzl6xzfzVd6LBXC-2FJGkqjqb5W4qW41pJqq3o6cBtzfaNbqKxjtfGk-2FqSRPPEZHpXM0AP8cecOUNDYquPyIiWop0RI-2FSN1ft9SJRHv4hj70xHTBDF83-2FhBO5GX5gXg1EpA-3DpdSw_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjAsE1Zi6tzOlV7-2FvSOebYnavHKJvVnCb2rII3gg1FDdlopGtDrZsL9eoyZhDy-2FFPje-2BYrILSNtJbl9oIShQAOOPnkXEMnPX4w9gc4xjw8VMBL3OKvtcz-2BUWwufpdVFw1d6vkdDU3beDV22KIEVG95HC07YScpb7nQuRbsPi4YzAQz0ph2D9WhATJiNvGVkHnW2DfcHZDYd-2FXlXjn7SosUjXijSRtRtZSnbCZEWieLx8w6Jo3m0qvbu6kVrtNyouhttZAgZtgaCNBDAXJmLgg9-2BiT10IQGzsUwESEjXXWpurXDFTJ2vWLeGqPaJjnfRUogrOd3Z8CseTRhARZI3Ti69QtQelWjTUU10InK2O3KBfLuyNZMtHpMM0-2BXwTOnsXDWYVYrc4KOi15yRZiDN1xkrpMcyCuIk8cOVXaXzf5OdFw-3D-3D)_

clean_body: NH Republicans Stand for the 2nd Amendment From the Desk of Chairman Stepanek Derek, This is a bit longer of an email than we normally send, but I wanted to give you an update as to how we're protecting the Second Amendment and Article 2a rights here in New Hampshire. Democrats are doing what they do best: using our mental health crisis to push their extreme agenda to restrict our rights to keep and bear arms. Democrats both Nationally and locally will continue to push their agenda at the cost of your rights - it’s time to put a stop to this. As they took back control in D.C. in January the Democrats made it clear that new gun control legislation was an integral part of their agenda. In early March, H.R. 1446 was introduced to the United States House of Representatives, a bill which imposes erroneous restrictions on the Second Amendment. States like Colorado sadly have the most stringent gun control laws on the books but they unfortunately do nothing to prevent criminals from obtaining firearms. These laws only infringe on law-abiding citizens' right to self-defense - the very same patriotic citizens who might prevent tragedies. These proposal just move us one step closer to what Democrats have long sought: a national gun owner registry. It is ironic that the people parroting the phrase “Common Sense Gun Reform” don’t know the first thing about the right to keep and bear arms. Squad Congresswoman Ayanna Pressley (D-MA) was recently quoted as saying, “The trauma of gun violence in our communities is endless. It’s time we abolish the filibuster and pass meaningful gun control legislation - background checks, automatic weapons ban, gun licensing, and so much more.” No, Congresswoman Pressley, gun violence is not endless and it’s happening mostly in cities run by Democrats. Any firearm owner could tell you that background checks are already in place. Automatic weapons have been banned in the United States for nearly 40 years. They let slip what they're really after - an end to the filibuster, and free rein to pass whatever legislation they would like. Here in New Hampshire, our local Democrats are no different. Just last year they tried to force through a “Red Flag" law which would have allowed an individual’s firearms to be taken by any judge without due process. Thankfully that bill and other pieces of legislation that infringed on the Second Amendment were vetoed by Governor Chris Sununu. More recently Congressman Chris Pappas has promoted #GunReformNow on twitter, and Ann Kuster has co-sponsored the aforementioned H.R. 1446. If the Democrats have it their way and retake the New Hampshire Legislature in 2022, you can be sure that these radical policies will crop up once more. By contrast, New Hampshire Republicans are taking steps to preserve our Second Amendment and Article 2a rights - even against infringements by the Federal government. Earlier this month, Republicans in the New Hampshire Senate proposed Senate Bill 154 which prohibits the enforcement of any Presidential Executive Order which restricts or regulates the right of the people to keep and bear arms. We view our Second Amendment and Article 2a rights not simply as important rights, but fundamental ones. We need to stop the Democrats and their gun grab both in New Hampshire and in D.C. and we need your help to do so. The Democrats are asking for an inch, but they will take a mile as soon as they can.Once your rights are gone, they’re never going to come back. Regards, Stephen Stepanek NHGOP Chairman | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |
